summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitAI V4 features: batch progress indicator, retry generation button, aesthetic score/suggestions from Gemini, and image caching in MongoDB. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns correct FitAI message
Backend API /api/generate-outfits returns outfits with aesthetic_score (1-10) field
Backend API /api/generate-outfits returns outfits with suggestions (string) field
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image accepts outfit_title form field
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image accepts items_used (JSON) form field
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image accepts force_regenerate form field
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image returns cached=false on first call
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image returns cached=true on second call with same person+outfit
Backend API /api/generate-outfit-image with force_regenerate=true bypasses cache (cached=false)
MongoDB image_cache collection is populated after generation with cache_key, outfit_title, items_used, person_hash
Backend API /api/saved-looks GET returns array correctly
Backend API /api/saved-looks POST creates and DELETE removes saved look correctly
Frontend landing page loads with FitAI branding
Frontend onboarding page loads correctly with step indicator
Frontend SwipePage code has batch-progress element with data-testid='batch-progress'
Frontend SwipePage code shows 'Generating outfits X/Y' with percentage
Frontend SwipePage code has retry-generation-btn with data-testid='retry-generation-btn'
Frontend SwipePage code shows aesthetic_score badge next to outfit title (X/10)
Frontend SwipePage code shows suggestions with Lightbulb icon when present
Frontend SwipePage code hides suggestions section when empty string
critical_code_review_comments: All V4 features properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes
Caching logic uses MD5 hash of person_hash + outfit_title + sorted items_used - working correctly
Progress bar correctly calculates percentage and hides when all outfits generated
Retry button correctly passes force_regenerate=true to bypass cache
Aesthetic score badge uses conditional rendering (only shows when present)
Suggestions section uses trim() check to hide when empty string
seed_data_creation: None required - tests create and cleanup their own data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V4 features tested and working: (1) generate-outfits returns aesthetic_score (1-10) and suggestions fields, (2) generate-outfit-image accepts outfit_title, items_used, force_regenerate fields, (3) Caching works - second call returns cached=true, force_regenerate bypasses cache, (4) MongoDB image_cache collection populated correctly, (5) Frontend SwipePage has batch progress bar, retry button, aesthetic score badge, and suggestions with lightbulb icon. Note: Full end-to-end UI testing with real images requires manual testing.

aesthetic_score_and_suggestions.notes: Returns aesthetic_score (1-10) and suggestions (string) for each outfit

image_caching.notes: Second call with same person+outfit returns cached=true, force_regenerate bypasses cache

mongodb_image_cache.notes: Stores cache_key, image_url, outfit_title, items_used, person_hash, created_at

batch_progress_indicator.notes: data-testid='batch-progress', shows 'Generating outfits X/Y' with percentage, hides when complete

retry_generation_button.notes: data-testid='retry-generation-btn', appears on generated images, calls retryGeneration with force=true

aesthetic_score_badge.notes: Shows X/10 badge next to outfit title when aesthetic_score present

suggestions_display.notes: Shows with Lightbulb icon, hidden when suggestions is empty string
